files.patch:
@@ -10,8 +10,11 @@ jobs:
     runs-on: macos-15
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
-      - uses: swift-actions/setup-swift@v2
-        with:
-          swift-version: "6.0.3"
+      - name: Select Xcode
+        run: sudo xcode-select -s /Applications/Xcode_16.4.app/Contents/Developer
+      - name: Toolchain info
+        run: |
+          xcodebuild -version
+          xcrun swift --version
       - name: Swift test
-        run: swift test
+        run: xcrun swift test
